properties.displayName: Newly Observed OAuth App Consent With High Microsoft Graph Activity
properties.query:
let RecentLookback = 24h;
let HistoricalLookback = 90d;
let MinGraphApiCalls = 100;
let ConsentOperations = dynamic([
    "Consent to application",
    "Add OAuth2PermissionGrant",
    "Add delegated permission grant",
    "Add app role assignment to service principal"
]);
let RecentConsentEvents =
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(RecentLookback)
| where OperationName in~ (ConsentOperations)
| extend InitiatedByUser = tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName)
| mv-expand TargetResource = TargetResources
| extend
    ServicePrincipalId = tostring(TargetResource.id),
    TargetResourceType = tostring(TargetResource.type),
    AppName = tostring(TargetResource.displayName)
| where TargetResourceType =~ "ServicePrincipal"
| where isnotempty(ServicePrincipalId)
| summarize arg_min(TimeGenerated, *) by ServicePrincipalId
| project
    FirstRecentConsentTime = TimeGenerated,
    OperationName,
    ServicePrincipalId,
    AppName,
    InitiatedByUser,
    CorrelationId;
let HistoricalConsentEvents =
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(HistoricalLookback) .. ago(RecentLookback))
| where OperationName in~ (ConsentOperations)
| mv-expand TargetResource = TargetResources
| extend
    ServicePrincipalId = tostring(TargetResource.id),
    TargetResourceType = tostring(TargetResource.type)
| where TargetResourceType =~ "ServicePrincipal"
| where isnotempty(ServicePrincipalId)
| summarize by ServicePrincipalId;
let NewConsentEvents =
RecentConsentEvents
| join kind=leftanti HistoricalConsentEvents on ServicePrincipalId;
let GraphCalls =
MicrosoftGraphActivityLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(RecentLookback)
| where isnotempty(ServicePrincipalId)
| summarize 
    GraphCallCount = count(),
    SuccessfulGraphCallCount = countif(ResponseStatusCode between (200 .. 299)),
    AppId = take_any(AppId),
    GraphScopes = make_set_if(Scopes, isnotempty(Scopes), 20),
    GraphRoles = make_set_if(Roles, isnotempty(Roles), 20),
    FirstGraphCall = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastGraphCall = max(TimeGenerated)
    by ServicePrincipalId;
NewConsentEvents
| join kind=inner GraphCalls on ServicePrincipalId
| where GraphCallCount >= MinGraphApiCalls
| extend GraphRolesCustomDetail = strcat_array(GraphRoles, ", ")
| extend GraphScopesCustomDetail = strcat_array(GraphScopes, ", ")
| project 
    AppName,
    AppId,
    ServicePrincipalId,
    GraphCallCount,
    SuccessfulGraphCallCount,
    GraphScopesCustomDetail,
    GraphRolesCustomDetail,
    FirstRecentConsentTime,
    FirstGraphCall,
    LastGraphCall,
    OperationName,
    InitiatedByUser,
    CorrelationId
| order by GraphCallCount desc
